name: Shrimp Tostadas with Guacamole
recipeIngredient: 1 small hot chili pepper, seeded and halved lengthwise
1 can refried beans (16 oz), divided into 2 tablespoons oil
small bowls of chopped lettuce, onion, queso fresco (Mexican cheese), and parsley.
recipeInstructions:
Guacamole:
1. Cut avocados in half and remove pits.
2. Scoop avocado meat out of the shell and place it in a food processor.
3. Add lime juice to the food processor and process until pureed.
4. Add salt, onion, tomato, garlic, and hot pepper to the mixture; process again until finely pureed.
5. Transfer guacamole to a small bowl for serving.
Fry tortillas:
1. Heat 2 inches of oil in a shallow skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Slide tortillas one by one into the hot oil and fry on each side until golden brown.
3. Remove immediately with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
Grill shrimp and prepare beans:
1. Thread shrimp onto skewers (10-inch lengths) and grill over medium coals, turning occasionally, until cooked through.
2. Transfer cooked shrimp to a small dish for serving.
3. In a saucepan, transfer the refried beans from the can and add 2 tablespoons oil. Stir well and heat over low heat.
Assemble tostadas:
1. Place refried beans on top of a fried tortilla.
2. Arrange grilled shrimp over the beans.
3. Spoon a little salsa and guacamole over the shrimp.
4. Top with lettuce, onion, and cheese.
5. Garnish with parsley or cilantro before serving.
